title: Adventures and Castles
description: What the title says.  Adventures, and castles.
body:
Welcome to Adventures and Castles (AC). This is a WIP modpack that has Taverns and Dungeons, Create, Tetra, and more.
**Plans for the future:** - Dungeons + or YUNG's modset - Waystones (?) - Dynamic Trees (?) - Immersive Weathering or Serene Seasons - Removing travelers with replacement of a similar backpack mod
